notes: Nemotron-first seed catalog. Local Satchel must represent all supported NVIDIA VRAM card-size tiers in the catalog, then select the best validated compatible Nemotron model for the detected tier. The Windows Phase 0 spike validated the official NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano 4B Q4_K_M GGUF on Windows 11-generation NVIDIA hardware using llama.cpp CUDA. Larger Nemotron entries still require hardware validation before becoming automatic defaults.

models.license: other; verify NVIDIA model card/license before redistribution
models.notes: Validated on RTX 4070 Laptop GPU with 8188 MiB VRAM using llama.cpp b9453 CUDA 12.4 Windows binary plus cudart DLL package. Server used about 3249 MiB GPU memory during chat. Start with --reasoning off for normal chat output; without it, this model may return reasoning_content and empty content.
models.ux_label: Best choice for 6-8 GB NVIDIA GPUs

models.license: other; verify NVIDIA/quantized model card/license before redistribution
models.notes: Candidate larger Nemotron model for quality testing. Not yet validated on this Windows 8 GB VRAM machine. If Q4_K_M is tight, test Q3_K_M or Q3_K_S before rejecting the 8B family. Do not auto-download as the default until a Windows CUDA spike validates startup, chat output, GPU memory use, and stop behavior.
models.ux_label: Higher-quality Nemotron candidate for larger NVIDIA GPUs

recommendation_policy.selection_rule: Map detected VRAM to a catalog vram_tier, then choose that tier's recommended_model_id if it is validated and automatic_recommendation_eligible. If the exact tier has no validated recommendation yet, fall back to the best lower-tier validated Nemotron model and show the tier's candidate models as Advanced/research-needed. Never hardcode this laptop's 8 GB model as the universal default.
recommendation_policy.fallback_rule: If the detected card-size tier has no validated recommendation, fall back to the highest lower validated tier. If no validated tier fits, do not download automatically; explain the hardware limit and suggest the smallest supported tier.

vram_tiers.label: 4 GB NVIDIA GPUs
vram_tiers.user_message: This GPU is below the current Local Satchel V1 validated floor. Do not auto-download a model until a smaller Nemotron tier is validated.

vram_tiers.label: 6 GB NVIDIA GPUs
vram_tiers.user_message: Use the validated small Nemotron tier.

vram_tiers.label: 8 GB NVIDIA GPUs
vram_tiers.user_message: Use the validated small Nemotron tier; test 8B only as an Advanced experiment until validated on 8 GB.

vram_tiers.label: 10 GB NVIDIA GPUs
vram_tiers.user_message: Use the validated 8 GB tier for now; evaluate the 8B Nemotron candidate before making it automatic.

vram_tiers.label: 12 GB NVIDIA GPUs
vram_tiers.user_message: This tier must have its own validated Nemotron recommendation. Until the 8B candidate is validated, fall back to the validated 4B model and show 8B as Advanced.

vram_tiers.label: 16 GB NVIDIA GPUs
vram_tiers.user_message: This tier needs a higher-quality validated Nemotron recommendation; do not silently use the 8 GB model as the planned final answer.

vram_tiers.label: 24 GB NVIDIA GPUs
vram_tiers.user_message: This tier needs a larger validated Nemotron recommendation before V1 can claim full 24 GB optimization.

vram_tiers.label: 32 GB NVIDIA GPUs
vram_tiers.user_message: This tier needs a larger validated Nemotron recommendation before V1 can claim full 32 GB optimization.

vram_tiers.label: 48 GB+ NVIDIA GPUs
vram_tiers.user_message: This tier needs a workstation-class validated Nemotron recommendation before V1 can claim full high-VRAM optimization.
